title: Cloud API Overrun Cost Calculator
description: Calculates the total cost impact of API overrun events in cloud services, incorporating latency penalties, retry costs, data egress, and SLA breach compensation. Aligns with ISO 9001, Six Sigma DMAIC, and WERC cost-to-serve standards.

inputs.label: Monthly API Call Volume
inputs.businessContext: Total number of API calls made per month, including successful and overrun calls.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of API calls made per month, including successful and overrun calls.

inputs.label: Overrun Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of API calls that exceed the agreed response time threshold (e.g., >200ms).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of API calls that exceed the agreed response time threshold (e.g., >200ms).

inputs.label: Average Overrun Duration
inputs.businessContext: Average extra time beyond the SLA threshold for overrun calls.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average extra time beyond the SLA threshold for overrun calls.

inputs.label: Cost per API Call
inputs.businessContext: Direct cost per API call (compute, network, storage).

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct cost per API call (compute, network, storage).

inputs.label: Retry Cost per Call
inputs.businessContext: Additional cost incurred when a call is retried due to timeout or error.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional cost incurred when a call is retried due to timeout or error.

inputs.label: Retry Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of overrun calls that trigger a retry.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of overrun calls that trigger a retry.

inputs.label: Monthly Data Egress
inputs.businessContext: Total data transferred out of the cloud per month.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total data transferred out of the cloud per month.

inputs.label: Egress Cost per GB
inputs.businessContext: Cost per GB of data egress (varies by provider and region).

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost per GB of data egress (varies by provider and region).

inputs.label: SLA Penalty Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of monthly service fee credited as penalty if SLA is breached.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of monthly service fee credited as penalty if SLA is breached.

inputs.label: Monthly Service Fee
inputs.businessContext: Base monthly fee paid to the cloud provider.

businessContext_i18n.en: Base monthly fee paid to the cloud provider.

inputs.label: Overrun Threshold (SLA)
inputs.businessContext: Maximum acceptable response time per the SLA.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum acceptable response time per the SLA.

inputs.label: Cloud Region
inputs.businessContext: Geographic region of the cloud service, affects egress costs and latency.

businessContext_i18n.en: Geographic region of the cloud service, affects egress costs and latency.

inputs.label: Include Hidden Costs (e.g., opportunity loss)
inputs.businessContext: If true, adds estimated hidden costs like customer churn and brand impact.

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, adds estimated hidden costs like customer churn and brand impact.

rules.message: Overrun rate must be between 0% and 100%.
Retry rate must be between 0% and 100%.
SLA penalty percentage must be between 0% and 100%.
Average overrun duration must be greater than 0 ms.

rules.condition: cost_per_call >= 0 AND retry_cost_per_call >= 0 AND egress_cost_per_gb >= 0 AND monthly_service_fee >= 0
rules.message: All cost inputs must be non-negative.
If overrun rate is 0%, retry rate must also be 0%.

thresholds.alert: Total overrun cost exceeds $10,000. Immediate review recommended.
Retry cost exceeds $5,000. Consider optimizing retry logic.
Overrun rate above 10% indicates high SLA breach risk.
Data egress exceeds 10 TB. Review data transfer patterns.

formulas.label: Overrun Call Volume
formulas.description: Number of API calls that exceed the SLA threshold.

formulas.label: Direct Overrun Cost
formulas.description: Direct cost of overrun calls at standard rate.

formulas.label: Retry Cost
formulas.description: Additional cost from retries triggered by overrun calls.

formulas.label: Egress Overrun Cost
formulas.description: Extra egress cost due to retries and larger payloads from overrun calls.
formulas.note: Assumes 50% of egress is attributable to overrun events.

formulas.label: SLA Penalty Cost
formulas.description: Penalty incurred if overrun rate exceeds SLA threshold.

formulas.label: Hidden Loss Drivers
formulas.description: Estimated hidden costs (customer churn, brand impact) if enabled.
formulas.note: 30% uplift based on industry studies (Lean Six Sigma).

formulas.label: Total Overrun Cost
formulas.description: Primary result: total monthly cost impact of API overruns.

primary.label: Total Overrun Cost
primary.description: Aggregate monthly cost from API overruns including direct, retry, egress, SLA penalties, and hidden losses.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Customer Churn Impact
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Estimated revenue loss from customers leaving due to poor API performance.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Brand Reputation Cost
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Long-term cost of negative brand perception from frequent overruns.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Operational Overhead
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Extra engineering time spent debugging and mitigating overruns.

suggestedActions.label: Optimize API Endpoints
suggestedActions.description: Review and refactor slow endpoints to reduce overrun rate.

suggestedActions.label: Implement Caching
suggestedActions.description: Use CDN or in-memory cache to reduce call volume and latency.

suggestedActions.label: Adjust Retry Policy
suggestedActions.description: Use exponential backoff and limit retries to reduce retry_cost.

suggestedActions.label: Negotiate SLA Terms
suggestedActions.description: Work with provider to adjust penalty thresholds or reduce fees.

suggestedActions.label: Monitor Data Egress
suggestedActions.description: Analyze egress patterns and compress data to lower egress_overrun_cost.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Data Confidence Adjusted Total
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Total overrun cost adjusted for data quality and confidence level (e.g., ±15% uncertainty).
